multi_patch_subnet.notes: Basic VGG16 with Avg/Max pooling. Our local implementation is better.

adaptive_patch_selection.notes: Uses Graph-Based Manifold Ranking which has a non-commercial license.

orderless_aggregation.notes: Concatenation of Average and Maximum pooling.

salient_object_detection.notes: TF2 port of an older algorithm; non-commercial license.
